# mrclean test fixture — synthetic invalid value for detection pattern testing
# Source: OpenAI API key format (sk-proj- variant with T3BlbkFJ base64 marker)
# Checksum-flip: key body uses 'A' padding on both sides of the required T3BlbkFJ marker
# Format: sk-proj- (8) + 58 word chars + T3BlbkFJ (8) + 58 word chars = 132 chars total
# License: test fixture only — not a real credential

OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-proj-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAT3BlbkFJAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
